name: small viewing room
description: I'm in a small viewing room
hints: There is a small window here. Look through it to survey the control room.
LOOK WINDOW to see into the control room and notice the debris blocking the door.
LOOK WINDOW reveals the control room below with the door blocked by debris. DOWN returns to the blue anteroom.

effects:
Message: I'm looking into the control room. I notice that the door is
 blocked by some debris.

notes: Small viewing room with a window into the control room. Reveals that the control room door is blocked by debris (the tape recorder remains). DOWN returns to the blue anteroom (room 15).
